items.title: Picked eight batters to be more fearless: Sikandar Raza
items.summary: Zimbabwe put on a show in the opening T20I against Bangladesh to take an early series lead

items.title: Naved Nawaz backs Bangladesh's own biomechanics lab to aid player development
items.summary: Newly appointed coach educator and Under-23 coach Naved Nawaz discusses Bangladesh's plans for a localised coaching curriculum, the need for biomechanics education and how the new Under-23 programme can strengthen the national team's talent pipeline

items.title: Ngarava, Muzarabani sink Bangladesh in T20I opener
items.summary: Chasing 171, Bangladesh suffered an early collapse, losing Saif Hassan (12), Tanzid Hasan Tamim (16) and Parvez Hossain Emon (5) inside the powerplay to slump to 34 for three.

items.title: Muzarabani, Ngarava give Zimbabwe early series lead
items.summary: Bangladesh suffered their fourth loss in five games on this tour

items.title: Muzarabani and Ngarava overwhelm Bangladesh again
items.summary: The two Zimbabwe quicks picked up four wickets each to defend a total of 170

items.title: Bangladesh get Taskin Ahmed boost as they bowl in Bulawayo
items.summary: Taskin was not part of Bangladesh's squad, but got called up after an injury to Mustafizur Rahman

items.title: Australia internationals unlikely to play much WNCL
items.summary: Australia's series against Bangladesh, New Zealand and the women's Champions Trophy, as well as the WPL likely to keep their best away from domestic cricket

items.title: Tigers look to turn the tide in T20Is
items.summary: With the likes of Nahid Rana, Shoriful Islam and Taskin in the bowling attack, Hridoy said Bangladesh are aware of their strengths and are determined to bounce back.

items.title: High-flying Zimbabwe meet under-strength Bangladesh in T20I series opener
items.summary: Already without Litton, Mehidy, Taskin and Mahmud, Bangladesh will also miss the injured Mustafizur

items.title: Shoriful four-for, Tanzid 94 guide Bangladesh to consolation win
items.summary: A 151-run partnership between Tanzid Hasan and Soumya Sarkar sealed an easy chase against a second-choice Zimbabwe bowling attack

items.title: Shoriful, openers shine as Tigers earn consolation victory
items.summary: Having already conceded the series after losing the opening two matches, the visitors produced a clinical all-round display to finish the series on a positive note.

items.title: West Indies desperate for ODI upswing with World Cup qualification on the line
items.summary: For New Zealand, meanwhile, this series offers a chance to get back to winning ways after a defeat to Bangladesh in their last ODI assignment

items.title: Bangladesh bowl; Raza leads Zimbabwe in Ngarava's absence
items.summary: Bangladesh left out fast bowler Nahid Rana and legspinner Rishad Hossain while Zimbabwe rested Blessing Muzarabani and Newman Nyamhuri

items.title: Bangladesh bowl with two changes in 3rd ODI
items.summary: Bangladesh will bowl first in the third and final ODI against Zimbabwe in Harare today after making two changes to their playing XI for the dead rubber.

items.title: Mustafizur Rahman ruled out for four weeks with hamstring and knee injuries
items.summary: Seamer will travel to Birmingham for rehabilitation after being ruled out of Zimbabwe tour

items.title: Zimbabwe eye 3-0 sweep as Bangladesh seek consolation
items.summary: Zimbabwe haven't completed a clean sweep of Bangladesh in any format since 2001
